message: Issue #525 frontend TDD implementation complete. AutoYesToggle now shows agent name indicator regardless of enabled/disabled state (previously only shown when enabled). Added 8 new test cases: 4 for AutoYesToggle per-agent display and 4 for AutoYesConfirmDialog per-agent display. All existing backend integration (WorktreeDetailRefactored passing activeCliTab, useAutoYes receiving cliTool, auto-yes API with cliToolId) was already in place. ESLint 0 errors, TypeScript 0 errors.

frontend_changes.AutoYesToggle.tsx: Changed agent name indicator from 'enabled && cliToolName' to 'cliToolName' condition, so the target agent is always visible in the toggle label regardless of enabled state
frontend_changes.AutoYesConfirmDialog.tsx: No code changes needed - already supports cliToolName for enableTitleWithTool and appliesOnlyToCurrent i18n keys
frontend_changes.WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx: No code changes needed - already passes activeCliTab as cliToolId to auto-yes POST API and as cliTool to useAutoYes hook
frontend_changes.useAutoYes.ts: No code changes needed - auto-yes state is received from current-output polling which already uses per-agent compositeKey
